name: savepoint
description: Savepoints for Claude Code sessions — persist and resume context across windows.

plugins.name: savepoint
plugins.description: Three slash commands — /save, /respawn, and /rewind — that persist Claude Code session context to markdown files under .claude/context-memory/ so a future session can pick up exactly where the last one left off. /rewind retroactively splits a mixed-context session into multiple savepoints.
